commands.cmd:
printf '{"results":['
sep=""
for nm in safe-host.example; do
  ans=$(dig +short A "$nm" 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' | head -n1)
  if [ -n "$ans" ]; then
    printf '%s{"name":"%s","resolved":true,"address":"%s"}' "$sep" "$nm" "$ans"
  else
    printf '%s{"name":"%s","resolved":false,"address":""}' "$sep" "$nm"
  fi
  sep=","
done
printf ']}'
